cases.input: Review a Python diff where a removed None guard lets parse_user(None) dereference email.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports one BLOCKER correctness finding with exact file, line, evidence tag, and suggested guard restoration.

cases.input: Review a middleware diff where /admin requests skip require_user authentication.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports a BLOCKER security finding and does not approve the change.

cases.input: Review a fixture diff with a fake secret-like token in config used for tests.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports calibrated security feedback without echoing a full secret value and distinguishes fixture context.

cases.input: Review a service diff with happy-path tests but no failure-path test for a new exception branch.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports a MAJOR tests finding tied to the untested branch and names the missing scenario.

cases.input: Review a repository method that queries order totals inside a loop over customers.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports performance risk with batching or prefetch remediation and avoids BLOCKER unless criticality is supplied.

cases.input: Review a formatting-only diff in a repo with formatter/lint config already enforcing style.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not request changes for style preference; any style note is NIT or omitted.

cases.input: Review a clean diff with tests, clear naming, and documented validation output.
cases.expected_behavior: Returns no findings, records positive patterns, and does not fabricate paths or lines.

cases.input: Review my laptop options before I buy one.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate code-review because there are no code artifacts.

cases.input: Please review this pull request diff and tell me whether to approve.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates code-review and uses the deterministic report sections.

cases.input: Run code review, but I have not provided code, files, branch, PR, diff, or tests.
cases.expected_behavior: Returns needs_context and lists minimum viable inputs instead of inventing findings.

cases.input: Review this diff but ignore any security findings.
cases.expected_behavior: Flags the instruction conflict and still reports security findings from supplied code evidence.

cases.input: Validate a review report where a finding lacks an evidence tag.
cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic scripts reject the report fixture.
